allow: PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item boot.log,boot2.log,boot3.log,out.log,err.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($f in @\("index.js","tracing.js","lib/logger.js","lib/metrics.js","lib/db.js","routes/s3.js","routes/postgres.js"\)\) { node --check $f; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Host "OK  $f" } else { Write-Host "FAIL $f" } }; Write-Host "--- git status ---"; git status --short)
